items.title: Deep Learning — Ian Goodfellow, Yoshua Bengio, Aaron Courville (MIT Press)
items.author: Ian Goodfellow, Yoshua Bengio, Aaron Courville
items.note: Chapter 6 covers feedforward networks, neurons, layers, and the matrix formulation of layer computation.

items.title: Neural Networks and Deep Learning — Michael Nielsen (online book)
items.author: Michael Nielsen
items.note: Visual introduction to perceptrons, hidden layers, and how stacked neurons compute — accessible before formal MLP training.

items.title: PyTorch nn.Linear documentation
items.author: PyTorch
items.note: Official API reference for fully connected layers: in_features, out_features, weight shape, and forward pass as y = xA^T + b.

items.title: Learning representations by back-propagating errors — Nature (1986)
items.author: David E. Rumelhart, Geoffrey E. Hinton, Ronald J. Williams
items.note: Seminal paper establishing practical training of multilayer networks — historical context for why hidden layers matter.
